'''Carratos''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]], roughly forty [[Parsec/Legends|parsecs]] from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="Before the Storm">''[[Before the Storm]]''</ref>

==History==
During the [[Galactic War]], the people of Carratos solved their rubbish problem through dumping their trash on one of its moons.<ref name="Mission" />

Heavily urbanized, Carratos was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] chosen by the [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] to be a place of refuge for some of their youngest initiates while they were being persecuted on [[Lucazec/Legends|Lucazec]]. [[Akanah Norand Goss Pell|Akanah]] was sent to a [[school]] in the [[Chofin]] settlement. Around this time, Carratos was subjugated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] around [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]]. The Empire established a heavy garrison and trapped its residents with high taxes for departure. When the Empire collapsed and the garrison withdrew, Carratos spiraled into crime and became home to many [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]].

The planet was conquered by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] during their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|galactic invasion]].<ref name="TEA" />
